title: VibeIDE persisted plan steps (embedded JSON block)

mcpServersAllow.description: Optional allowlist of MCP server ids/names for this step.

mcpToolsAllow.description: Optional allowlist of MCP tool names (as registered in the client) for this step.

checkpointIdx.description: Message index of checkpoint before this step (optional).

worktreeBranch.description: Optional git worktree branch binding for this step (see references/v1/plan-worktree-branch.md).

explorationId.description: Optional speculative exploration session id linking parallel worktrees.
